description: Create a new item (wiki page) in a workspace

body.title: Deployment Runbook
body.content:
# Deployment Runbook

## Prerequisites

- Docker installed
- Access to production environment

## Steps

1. Pull latest image
2. Run smoke tests
3. Deploy to production
